title: TddOutput
description: Structured return from tdd-guide agent (Step 9.1, RED phase).

test_files.description: Absolute paths to test files created or modified for this phase.

expected_state.description: Expected state of the suite after tdd-guide finishes. RED is normal (tests fail or fail to compile); GREEN would mean the tests already pass against existing code, which means they're testing nothing — tdd-guide MUST flag this.

scenario_id.description: AC-ID or SCENARIO-ID this test covers.

test.description: test_file::test_name pointing at the covering test.
